TestCase.name: testMixNormalAndFilteredAggregates
TestCase.Resource: select sum(sal) filter (where deptno = 10), avg(sal) filter (where deptno = 20), count(*) from emp

LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[SUM($0) FILTER $1], EXPR$1=[AVG($0) FILTER $2], EXPR$2=[COUNT()]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], $f1=[=($7, 10)], $f2=[=($7, 20)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testMultipleFilteredAggregates
TestCase.Resource: select sum(sal) filter (where deptno = 10), avg(sal) filter (where deptno = 20) from emp
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[SUM($0) FILTER $1], EXPR$1=[AVG($0) FILTER $2]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], $f1=[=($7, 10)], $f2=[=($7, 20)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[SUM($0) FILTER $1], EXPR$1=[AVG($0) FILTER $2]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], $f1=[=($7, 10)], $f2=[=($7, 20)]) LogicalFilter(condition=[OR(=($7, 10), =($7, 20))]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])

TestCase.name: testSingleFilteredAggregate
TestCase.Resource: select sum(sal) filter (where deptno = 10) from emp
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[SUM($0) FILTER $1]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], $f1=[=($7, 10)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])
LogicalAggregate(group=[{}], EXPR$0=[SUM($0) FILTER $1]) LogicalProject(SAL=[$5], $f1=[=($7, 10)]) LogicalFilter(condition=[=($7, 10)]) LogicalTableScan(table=[[CATALOG, SALES, EMP]])
